allow: PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId = 35584" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine, ExecutablePath | Format-List; \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId = 35584"\).Path)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== node/vite processes ==="; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | ForEach-Object { $_.ProcessId.ToString\(\) + "  " + $_.CommandLine }; Write-Output "=== stray C: folder ==="; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Users\\Alex\\extind-website"\) { Write-Output "EXISTS"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\Alex\\extind-website" -Force | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -HideTableHeaders; Write-Output "--- git remote in it? ---"; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Users\\Alex\\extind-website\\.git"\) { git -C "C:\\Users\\Alex\\extind-website" remote -v } else { Write-Output "no .git" } } else { Write-Output "does not exist" })

PowerShell($procs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'extind-website' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'vite|run dev' }; if \($procs\) { $procs | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("stopping PID " + $_.ProcessId\); Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "no project dev servers running" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Output "=== port 5173 ==="; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Output "still in use" } else { Write-Output "free" }; Write-Output "=== remaining project node ==="; $r = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'extind-website' }; if \($r\) { $r | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.ProcessId } } else { Write-Output "none" })

Bash(git commit -m 'Update Services Slider content card *)
